reason: Successfully navigated to agent, verified idle status, sent message, received response containing "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded with agents list visible
Found and clicked agent "QA-20260331-000751-wx6i" in sidebar - Agent detail page opened
Verified agent status is "idle" - Status displayed as "idle" in the header
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Message successfully submitted, agent status changed to "working"
Waited for response - Response received within 2 seconds
Verified response mentions "4" - Response clearly displays "4" in the chat, with "Worked for 2s" indicator
Took screenshot - Full page screenshot captured showing complete conversation
